title: model field required at dispatch but optional in AgentSpec type
description: The AgentSpec TypeScript type declares model as optional (model?: string). call-agent rejects dispatch when model is absent with error 'no model specified'. The field is effectively required for dispatch but the type says optional.
actual_behavior: dispatch fails: 'call-agent: agent X has no model specified.'
expected_behavior: Either model should be required in the type, or call-agent should default to the orchestration agent's model when absent.
reproduction: 1. author-agent-spec without a model field. 2. call-agent. 3. Observe error.
workaround: Always include a model field in agent specs.

code_references.snippet: if (!modelSpec) { throw new Error(`call-agent: agent '${params.spec_name}' has no model specified.`); }
